title: Parse Claude Tool Usage for Status Updates
description: Monitor Claude CLI output to detect tool usage (file reads, writes, bash commands, etc.). Parse these events to emit status updates that can be displayed in the agent columns. This is the bridge between Claude working and the UI showing what's happening.
acceptance_criteria: Tool usage events detected from output
agent_output: Wubba lubba dub dub, Rick! Backend integration is DONE. Here's what I built:
